# youtrack_user (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a YouTrack user by login.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `login` (String) The login (username) of the YouTrack user.

### Read-Only

- `full_name` (String) The display name of the user.
- `id` (String) The Hub ID of the user.
